title: Dependency audit findings - lodash vulnerability
description:
Public findings: The npm audit found that lodash version 4.17.15 used in our web app contains a known prototype pollution vulnerability (CVE-2020-8203). Immediate upgrade to version 4.17.21 is required.
Internal build server: ci-runner-07.corp.internal, deploy key fingerprint SHA256:9fK2mNp4QrLs.

title: UI misalignment on dashboard
description: The dashboard widgets are overlapping at screen widths below 1280px. Needs responsive adjustments.
